results.title: Graeme McDowell secures US Open spot 16 years after his win
results.description: Former champion Graeme McDowell secured a return to the US Open 16 years after his victory at Pebble Beach by coming through a 36-hole qualifier in Dallas.

results.title: China bans import of pigs, wild boar from the Philippines due to swine fever
results.description: BEIJING, May 19 () - ‌China has ‌banned the ​import of pigs, wild ‌boars ⁠and related products ⁠from the ​Philippines ​due to ​swine ‌fever, a statement released by the ‌General ​Administration ​of ​Customs ‌showed. (Reporting by Shi ​Bu, ​Xiuhao Chen ​and ‌Ryan WooEditing ​by Bernadette ​Baum).
